summary: Completed testing of Extra Offers Send + Approval + Version Tracking features (P0/P1). All 15 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend testing verified: public review page, copy link button, project detail extra offers section.

issues: Minor: Console hydration warnings about <span> inside <tr>/<tbody> - React strict mode warning, does not affect functionality

critical_code_review_comments: POST /api/offers/{id}/send correctly generates 24-char hex review_token and returns review_url
Version snapshot created in offer_versions collection on send with is_auto_backup=True
Event 'sent' properly recorded in offer_events with actor email
GET /api/offers/review/{token} is truly public - works without Authorization header
Public review returns complete offer data: lines, totals, project info, company info
Project dashboard /api/projects/{id}/dashboard includes extra_offers list with review_token
OfferEditorPage.js has 'Копирай линк' button that copies review URL to clipboard
OfferReviewPage.js is standalone public page - no sidebar, no auth required
seed_data_creation: Created multiple TEST_SEND_REVIEW_* offers during testing for send/review flow validation
context_for_next_testing_agent: P0/P1 Extra Offers features fully tested. Backend: POST /api/offers/{id}/send generates review_token + creates version snapshot + records 'sent' event. GET /api/offers/review/{token} is PUBLIC (no auth). POST /api/offers/review/{token}/respond with action=approve/reject/revision updates status. GET /api/offers/{id}/events returns event history. Project dashboard includes extra_offers. Frontend: OfferReviewPage.js at /offers/review/:reviewToken is standalone public page. OfferEditorPage.js has 'Копирай линк' button. ProjectDetailPage.js shows 'Допълнителни оферти' section. Known review token for OFF-0089: 9863710a2ade49b7a36c7236.

POST /api/offers/{id}/send.notes: Generates 24-char hex review_token, creates version snapshot, records 'sent' event, returns review_url

GET /api/offers/review/{token} (PUBLIC).notes: Works without auth, returns offer lines, totals, project info, company info

GET /api/offers/{id}/events.notes: Returns event history including sent, viewed, approved_by_client/rejected_by_client/revision_requested

Project dashboard extra_offers.notes: /api/projects/{id}/dashboard includes extra_offers list with offer details and review_token

Frontend: OfferReviewPage public access.notes: /offers/review/{token} loads without auth, shows lines, totals, company info, approve/reject/revision buttons

Frontend: OfferReviewPage response flow.notes: After client responds, page shows confirmation message (e.g., 'Офертата е одобрена')

Frontend: OfferEditorPage copy link butt.notes: 'Копирай линк' button present when review_token exists, copies URL and shows 'Копирано!'

Frontend: ProjectDetailPage extra offers.notes: 'Допълнителни оферти' section displays with status badges and offer details

Validation: Cannot send offer without li.notes: Returns 400 error when trying to send offer with empty lines

Validation: Cannot send non-Draft offer.notes: Returns 400 error when trying to send already-sent offer

Validation: Cannot respond to already pr.notes: Returns 400 error when trying to respond to offer not in 'Sent' status

mocked_apis.note: NO MOCKED APIS - All real endpoints with MongoDB
mocked_apis.details: All tests use production endpoints and real database operations
